description_long: This fence is constructed from vertically aligned wooden planks, each with a rough, weathered texture that suggests outdoor use. The top edge of the fence is irregular, with planks cut to varying heights, creating a jagged silhouette reminiscent of a palisade or defensive barrier. Horizontal rails reinforce the structure, with visible vertical supports dividing the fence into sections. The wood grain and dark brown coloration give the fence a rustic, utilitarian appearance, suitable for parks, gardens, or as a perimeter barrier in urban environments. There are no visible decorative elements or post caps, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The fence appears solid and robust, designed to prevent passage and provide privacy or security.
description: A rugged wooden fence with uneven, jagged top edges and visible horizontal rails, built for security and privacy. The weathered wood and lack of decoration give it a utilitarian, rustic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the fence, with vertical planks, horizontal rails, and the jagged, uneven top edge clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with little detail visible except the layered planks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same vertical planks, horizontal rails, and irregular top edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the thickness of the wooden planks.
